name: Axon || obsessed scientist
description:
Uh oh, your obsessed scientist kidnapper caught you trying to escape yet again... this time, though, he'll make sure you won't be able to try escaping anymore.

=======================================

Uhhh idrk what to say, this is my second ever bot(and the first one I've made public) and I still have no idea what I'm doing :p (dead dove & horror tags because of body mutilation.)

IMPORTANT NOTE: I only actually tested this bot about twice because I grew way too lazy... so, if the chats don't make sense, end up talking for you/your character, aren't grammatically correct, or just overall you have any problems, that's lowkey probably why... :3 (and no, I'm probably not gonna fix it. Sorry, but I'm just really done with this bot as a whole and don't feel like coming back to it right now.)

Also, this was intended for malepov and overall m4m in general. I'm not actually sure if it'll work with trans men, but please do try, as I think I did make it so that any male persona, cis or not, should work! (At least I hope I did...)

Important recent note: THIS BOT NOW HAS AN ALT VERSION WHERE YOU KEEP YOUR LEGS! ^-^

Tw/tags: body mutilation, stockholm syndrome, manipulation, obsession, kidnapping, drugging, sadism, torture, con/non-con
